title: Email Connections for Automations
excerpt: I have multiple automations connected to my email account, and when my password resets or the connection breaks for any reason, there is no clear notification. The only way to catch the issue is by noticing that somethin…

posts.author: amandaj937 (Amanda Brown)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have multiple automations connected to my email account, and when my password resets or the connection breaks for any reason, there is no clear notification. The only way to catch the issue is by noticing that something isn’t working, which can cause delays and workflow disruptions.

It would be incredibly helpful to have a priority notification/email alert when a re-connection is required. Ideally, this should also be manageable in one centralized location, rather than having to check multiple boards to identify where an automation needs to be fixed. If this functionality already exists, I haven’t been able to locate it, where the help bot directs me has never resolved the issue.

This is a significant concern for me because I am not the primary user of the account, so when the connection breaks, it gets escalated to me to troubleshoot, but could have been broken for a significant amount of time. A proactive notification system would prevent delays and make it much easier to resolve issues quickly.
